executives.name: John Ciampaglia
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2017. Previously, Chief Operating Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP.

executives.name: Varinder Bhathal
executives.background: Managing Director, Corporate Finance and Investment Operations of Sprott Inc. since 2017. Chief Financial Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2018.

executives.name: Thomas Ulrich
executives.background: Managing Director, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP since 2012.

board_of_directors.name: John Ciampaglia
board_of_directors.background: President of the Trust and CEO of Sprott Asset Management LP.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Clark
board_of_directors.background: President of B-Filer Inc. since 2012. Formerly Executive Vice President at Northern Trust.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara Connolly Keady
board_of_directors.background: Director of New Business Development at Ceres Partners since 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Peyton Muldoon
board_of_directors.background: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson at Sotheby's International Realty since 2011.
